<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Alex Eberl — Tech Sales | SDR/BDR | Denver</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Geist:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Geist+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg:      #f7f6f2;
  --white:   #ffffff;
  --ink:     #111110;
  --mid:     #66655f;
  --faint:   #e8e6e0;
  --border:  #dddbd4;
  --card:    #faf9f6;
  --navy:    #152a44;
  --navy2:   #1e3d63;
  --accent:  #2563a8;
  --gold:    #8a6f2e;
  --green:   #1a6640;
  --green-bg:#e6f3eb;
  --mono:    'Geist Mono', monospace;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'Geist',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:0 4rem;height:56px;
  background:rgba(247,246,242,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:0;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--mid);text-decoration:none;padding:.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius:4px;transition:color .15s,background .15s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink);background:var(--faint);}
.nav-cta{
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.5rem 1.25rem;background:var(--navy);color:#fff;
  text-decoration:none;border-radius:2px;transition:opacity .15s;
}
.nav-cta:hover{opacity:.85;}

/* ── INTRO CARD (above the fold) ── */
#intro{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 400px;
  padding-top:56px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.intro-left{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  padding:5rem 4rem 5rem 4rem;
  border-right:1px solid var(--border);
}
/* top identity row */
.identity-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.25rem;
  margin-bottom:2.25rem;
}
.identity-photo{
  width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;
  object-fit:cover;object-position:center 12%;
  border:2.5px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.identity-text{}
.identity-name{
  font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;
  font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-.01em;
  color:var(--ink);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:.2rem;
}
.identity-line{
  font-size:.78rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--mid);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.identity-dot{width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
.otw-badge{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;
  font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--green);background:var(--green-bg);
  padding:.25rem .7rem;border-radius:20px;
}
.otw-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);}

/* headline */
.intro-headline{
  font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;
  font-size:clamp(2.6rem,4.5vw,4rem);
  font-weight:400;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.025em;
  color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:1.6rem;
}
.intro-headline em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent);}

.intro-pitch{
  font-size:.97rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.85;
  color:var(--mid);max-width:420px;margin-bottom:2rem;
}
.intro-pitch strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:500;}

/* quick-facts strip */
.quick-facts{
  display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;
  margin-bottom:2.25rem;
}
.qf-chip{
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.35rem .85rem;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--mid);
  border-radius:2px;background:var(--white);
}
.qf-chip.hi{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;border-color:var(--navy);}

.intro-actions{display:flex;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-dark{
  display:inline-block;padding:.75rem 1.6rem;
  background:var(--navy);color:#fff;
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;border:1.5px solid var(--navy);border-radius:2px;transition:all .2s;
}
.btn-dark:hover{background:transparent;color:var(--navy);}
.btn-ghost{
  display:inline-block;padding:.75rem 1.6rem;
  background:transparent;color:var(--ink);
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;transition:all .2s;
}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ink);}

/* right panel — photo */
.intro-right{
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:var(--navy);
}
.intro-photo-full{
  width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;object-position:center 12%;
  display:block;opacity:.72;
  filter:grayscale(15%) contrast(1.05);
}
.intro-photo-grad{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:60%;
  background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(21,42,68,1) 0%,rgba(21,42,68,0) 100%);
}
.intro-photo-top{
  position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:25%;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(21,42,68,.55) 0%,transparent 100%);
}
.intro-stats{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:2;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);
}
.istat{
  background:rgba(21,42,68,.65);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;
}
.istat-num{
  font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;
  font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:400;color:#fff;line-height:1;margin-bottom:.2rem;
}
.istat-label{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);}
.intro-corner{
  position:absolute;top:1.5rem;left:2rem;z-index:2;
  font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);
}

/* ── BRAND BAR ── */
.brand-bar{
  background:var(--navy);
  padding:1rem 4rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  overflow-x:auto;
}
.bb-item{
  font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);white-space:nowrap;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.65rem;
}
.bb-item.on{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);}
.bb-sep{width:1px;height:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);flex-shrink:0;}

/* ── SHARED ── */
section{padding:6rem 4rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.eyebrow{
  font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.65rem;
}
.eyebrow::after{content:'';flex:0 0 20px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);opacity:.4;}
.sec-title{
  font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.8rem,2.8vw,2.6rem);font-weight:400;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.12;
  color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:2.75rem;
}
.two-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start;}
.body-copy{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.9;}
.body-copy p{margin-bottom:1.1rem;}
.body-copy p:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
.body-copy strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:500;}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:var(--white);}
.about-sidebar{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;background:var(--border);}
.ab-row{
  background:var(--card);padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.ab-row:hover{background:var(--white);}
.ab-label{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.3rem;}
.ab-val{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--ink);}

/* how-i-think strip */
.think-row{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:1px;
  background:var(--border);margin-top:4rem;
}
.think-card{background:var(--card);padding:1.75rem 1.5rem;transition:background .15s;}
.think-card:hover{background:var(--white);}
.think-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;color:var(--mid);opacity:.55;margin-bottom:.8rem;}
.think-tier{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.35rem;}
.think-name{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.4rem;line-height:1.3;}
.think-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.7;}

/* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
#experience{background:var(--bg);}
.exp-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;background:var(--border);}
.exp-card{
  background:var(--white);
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr auto;
  gap:2rem;align-items:start;padding:2.25rem;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.exp-card:hover{background:var(--card);}
.exp-num{font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--faint);line-height:1;margin-top:.1rem;}
.exp-title{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.3rem;}
.exp-meta{
  display:flex;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:.65rem;
}
.exp-body{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.75;max-width:540px;}
.exp-body ul{padding-left:1rem;margin-top:.35rem;}
.exp-body li{margin-bottom:.25rem;}
.exp-tag{
  font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--mid);white-space:nowrap;
  align-self:flex-start;margin-top:.1rem;
}

/* ── PROJECTS ── */
#projects{background:var(--white);}
.projects-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:1px;background:var(--border);
}
.proj-card{
  background:var(--white);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.proj-card:hover{background:var(--card);}
.proj-card.placeholder{opacity:.45;border:1.5px dashed var(--border);background:transparent;}
.proj-thumb{
  height:110px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.proj-thumb.c1{background:#e8f0fa;color:#1e3d63;}
.proj-thumb.c2{background:#e6f3eb;color:#1a6640;}
.proj-thumb.c3{background:#fdf3e3;color:#7a5010;}
.proj-thumb.c4{background:#f0ecff;color:#4c2d9e;}
.proj-thumb.c5{background:#fce4ec;color:#9c0d38;}
.proj-thumb.c6{background:var(--faint);color:var(--mid);}
.proj-body{padding:1.5rem;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;}
.proj-cat{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);}
.proj-name{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.3;}
.proj-desc{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.65;flex:1;}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;margin-top:.5rem;}
.proj-tag{
  font-size:.6rem;font-weight:500;padding:.2rem .6rem;
  border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--mid);
}

/* ── LEARNING ── */
#learning{background:var(--navy);}
#learning .eyebrow{color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);}
#learning .eyebrow::after{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);}
#learning .sec-title{color:#fff;}
.books-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.book-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);padding:1.75rem;transition:background .15s;}
.book-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.book-cat{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);margin-bottom:.55rem;}
.book-title{font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:400;color:#fff;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:.2rem;}
.book-author{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);margin-bottom:1rem;}
.book-insight{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);line-height:1.75;padding-left:.85rem;border-left:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);}

/* ── CERTIFICATIONS ── */
#certifications{background:var(--bg);}
.cert-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:2.5rem;}
.cert-note{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);max-width:260px;line-height:1.6;text-align:right;}
.certs-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));
  gap:1px;background:var(--border);
}
.cert-card{background:var(--card);padding:1.4rem;position:relative;transition:background .15s;}
.cert-card:hover{background:var(--white);}
.cert-card.earned{background:var(--white);}
.cert-card.soon{opacity:.45;}
.cert-wk{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:.5rem;letter-spacing:.04em;}
.cert-card.earned .cert-wk{color:var(--gold);}
.cert-nm{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.2rem;line-height:1.25;}
.cert-org{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mid);}
.cert-pip{position:absolute;top:1.4rem;right:1.4rem;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;}
.cert-card.earned .cert-pip{background:var(--gold);}
.cert-card.soon .cert-pip{background:var(--border);}

/* ── COURSEWORK ── */
#coursework{background:var(--white);}
.course-intro{max-width:480px;margin-bottom:3rem;}
.course-intro p{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.85;}
.course-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(250px,1fr));
  gap:1px;background:var(--border);
}
.course-block{background:var(--card);padding:1.75rem;transition:background .15s;}
.course-block:hover{background:var(--white);}
.course-block-label{
  font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-bottom:.6rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.course-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.55rem;}
.course-nm{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--ink);}
.course-note-text{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);margin-top:.15rem;line-height:1.5;}

/* ── RESUME ── */
#resume{background:var(--bg);}
.resume-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 280px;gap:4.5rem;align-items:start;}
.res-doc{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:2.75rem;}
.res-name{font-family:'Instrument Serif',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.2rem;}
.res-sub{font-size:.83rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.res-contact{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.9;padding-bottom:1.75rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:1.75rem;}
.res-sec{margin-bottom:1.75rem;}
.res-sec-title{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem;padding-bottom:.45rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.res-entry{margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
.res-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:.2rem;}
.res-title-text{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);}
.res-date{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.66rem;color:var(--mid);}
.res-org{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.35rem;}
.res-entry ul{padding-left:.9rem;}
.res-entry li{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.2rem;}
.res-sidebar{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem;}
.res-side-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1.5rem;}
.res-side-title{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.85rem;}
.dl-btn{
  display:block;width:100%;text-align:center;padding:.85rem;
  background:var(--navy);color:#fff;
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;margin-top:.85rem;transition:opacity .15s;
}
.dl-btn:hover{opacity:.85;}
.target-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.target-row{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  font-size:.82rem;padding:.6rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.target-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0;}
.target-co{color:var(--ink);font-weight:400;}
.target-role{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--mid);}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--ink);border-bottom:none;}
#contact .eyebrow{color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);}
#contact .eyebrow::after{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
#contact .sec-title{color:#fff;}
.contact-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);margin-top:2.75rem;
}
.contact-tile{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);padding:2.25rem;
  text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s;
}
.contact-tile:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);}
.contact-label{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.contact-val{font-size:.95rem;color:#fff;font-weight:300;}

footer{
  background:var(--ink);padding:1.5rem 4rem;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
footer p{font-size:.68rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.18);}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease;}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:0 1.5rem;}
  .nav-links,.nav-cta{display:none;}
  #intro{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .intro-left{padding:4.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .intro-right{height:340px;}
  section{padding:4rem 1.5rem;}
  .two-col,.think-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .think-row{gap:1px;}
  .projects-grid,.books-grid,.certs-grid,.course-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .exp-card{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:.75rem;}
  .exp-num{display:none;}
  .resume-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;text-align:center;}
  .brand-bar{padding:1rem 1.5rem;}
  .cert-top{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;}
  .cert-note{text-align:left;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#intro" class="nav-logo">Alex Eberl</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#learning">Reading</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#coursework">Coursework</a></li>
    <li><a href="#resume">Resume</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get in touch</a>
</nav>

<!-- INTRO -->
<section id="intro" style="padding:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="intro-left">

    <!-- identity row — photo + name + status -->
    <div class="identity-row">
      <img class="identity-photo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alex Eberl">
      <div class="identity-text">
        <div class="identity-name">Alexander Kainoa Eberl</div>
        <div class="identity-line">
          <span>University of Denver · 2025</span>
          <span class="identity-dot"></span>
          <span>Denver, CO</span>
          <span class="identity-dot"></span>
          <span class="otw-badge"><span class="otw-dot"></span>Open to work</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <h1 class="intro-headline">Building a career<br>in <em>tech sales.</em><br>Doing it right.</h1>

    <p class="intro-pitch">
      I'm an early-career sales candidate who wants to be genuinely good at this — not just employed. <strong>SaaS, AI, and cybersecurity</strong> are where I'm focused. My background in marketing and psychology helps me think about the person on the other side of every conversation.
    </p>

    <div class="quick-facts">
      <span class="qf-chip hi">SDR / BDR Candidate</span>
      <span class="qf-chip">Tech Sales</span>
      <span class="qf-chip">AI</span>
      <span class="qf-chip">SaaS</span>
      <span class="qf-chip">Cybersecurity</span>
      <span class="qf-chip">Denver</span>
    </div>

    <div class="intro-actions">
      <a href="#about" class="btn-dark">See my work</a>
      <a href="#resume" class="btn-ghost">View resume</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-eberl-002115275" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">LinkedIn</a>
    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="intro-right">
    <img class="intro-photo-full" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alex Eberl">
    <div class="intro-photo-top"></div>
    <div class="intro-photo-grad"></div>
    <p class="intro-corner">SDR Candidate · DU 2025 · Denver</p>
    <div class="intro-stats">
      <div class="istat"><div class="istat-num">2×</div><div class="istat-label">Case comp finalist</div></div>
      <div class="istat"><div class="istat-num">10+</div><div class="istat-label">Certs in progress</div></div>
      <div class="istat"><div class="istat-num">SaaS</div><div class="istat-label">Real pipeline work</div></div>
      <div class="istat"><div class="istat-num">DU</div><div class="istat-label">Mktg + Psychology</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BRAND BAR -->
<div class="brand-bar">
  <div class="bb-item on">Sales</div>
  <div class="bb-sep"></div>
  <div class="bb-item on">AI</div>
  <div class="bb-sep"></div>
  <div class="bb-item on">Technology</div>
  <div class="bb-sep"></div>
  <div class="bb-item">Marketing</div>
  <div class="bb-sep"></div>
  <div class="bb-item">Psychology</div>

  <div class="bb-item" style="margin-left:auto;opacity:.5;">781-392-6577 · alexanderkeberl28@gmail.com</div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="two-col fade-up">
    <div>
      <p class="eyebrow">About me</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Serious about sales.<br>Building the skills<br>to prove it.</h2>
      <div class="body-copy">
        <p>I'm an early-career sales candidate who wants to be <strong>genuinely good at this</strong> — not just employed. I graduated from the University of Denver with a degree in Marketing and Psychology, but I don't lead with that. I lead with what I'm building toward: a long-term career in tech sales, starting as an SDR or BDR where I can learn fast and contribute early.</p>
        <p>At <strong>Beyond Now</strong>, I worked inside a real SaaS sales team. I did account research, helped build enterprise pitch decks, supported outbound prospecting, and learned what it actually takes to move opportunities forward. That experience made me want more of it.</p>
        <p>Right now I'm executing a structured 12-week certification plan across Salesforce, HubSpot, AI tools, and cybersecurity — and working through the sales methodology reading list most SDRs skip. My marketing and psychology background helps me write better outreach and ask better questions. But those are tools — <strong>not my identity.</strong> My identity is someone who is early in their career, building deliberately, and in it for the long run.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-sidebar">
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">University</div><div class="ab-val">University of Denver</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Degree</div><div class="ab-val">Marketing + Psychology</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Experience</div><div class="ab-val">Beyond Now — SaaS Sales Intern</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Target role</div><div class="ab-val">SDR / BDR — Tech Sales</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Industries</div><div class="ab-val">SaaS · AI · Cybersecurity</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Location</div><div class="ab-val">Denver, CO — open to relocate</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">Competitions</div><div class="ab-val">1st place + 3rd place — Case Competitions</div></div>
      <div class="ab-row"><div class="ab-label">LinkedIn</div><div class="ab-val"><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-eberl-002115275" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;">alexander-eberl-002115275</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- how i think -->
  <div style="margin-top:4.5rem;" class="fade-up">
    <p class="eyebrow">How I think</p>
    <p style="font-size:.93rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--mid);max-width:440px;margin-bottom:0;line-height:1.75;">Five areas that shape how I approach sales, outreach, and the technology I want to sell — in order of priority.</p>
    <div class="think-row">
      <div class="think-card"><div class="think-num">01</div><div class="think-tier">Primary</div><div class="think-name">Sales first</div><div class="think-desc">Everything I'm building points here. Pipeline, discovery, objection handling, and adding real value to a buyer.</div></div>
      <div class="think-card"><div class="think-num">02</div><div class="think-tier">Enabling</div><div class="think-name">AI as a tool</div><div class="think-desc">Building fluency in AI because reps who know how to use it will consistently outperform those who don't.</div></div>
      <div class="think-card"><div class="think-num">03</div><div class="think-tier">Context</div><div class="think-name">Tech literacy</div><div class="think-desc">To sell technology well you need to understand it. Building working knowledge in SaaS, cloud, and cybersecurity.</div></div>
      <div class="think-card"><div class="think-num">04</div><div class="think-tier">Supporting</div><div class="think-name">Marketing instincts</div><div class="think-desc">Knowing how demand is created and how messaging works makes me a sharper prospector and a better writer.</div></div>
      <div class="think-card"><div class="think-num">05</div><div class="think-tier">Supporting</div><div class="think-name">Psychology awareness</div><div class="think-desc">Understanding how people make decisions quietly informs every conversation — without being the main thing.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">
  <p class="eyebrow fade-up">Experience</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title fade-up">Where I've worked<br>and what I learned.</h2>
  <div class="exp-list fade-up">
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-num">01</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-title">Sales & Business Development Intern — Beyond Now</div>
        <div class="exp-meta"><span>SaaS / AI-Powered Marketplace</span><span>2024 – 2025</span><span>Denver, CO</span></div>
        <div class="exp-body"><ul>
          <li>Generated enterprise pipeline through outbound prospecting and targeted account research</li>
          <li>Built AI-driven pitch decks translating platform capabilities into clear business outcomes</li>
          <li>Crafted tailored outreach sequences and identified key decision-makers across target accounts</li>
          <li>Collaborated with AEs to support deal progression through the full enterprise sales cycle</li>
        </ul></div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-tag">SaaS Sales</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-num">02</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-title">President — Beta Theta Pi, University of Denver</div>
        <div class="exp-meta"><span>Leadership</span><span>2023 – 2024</span></div>
        <div class="exp-body"><ul>
          <li>Led 60+ member organization — set goals, drove accountability, managed cross-functional teams</li>
          <li>Managed operations, budgets, and stakeholder relationships with university administration</li>
          <li>Built consensus and influenced outcomes without formal authority — a core enterprise sales skill</li>
        </ul></div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-tag">Leadership</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-num">03</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-title">1st Place — Competitive Case Competition, DU</div>
        <div class="exp-meta"><span>Strategy + Presenting</span><span>2024</span></div>
        <div class="exp-body">Developed a full go-to-market strategy under time pressure and presented to industry judges. Placed first. Sharpened the ability to think commercially, structure arguments quickly, and communicate a clear recommendation to people who don't have time for fluff.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-tag">Strategy</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-num">04</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-title">3rd Place — Professional Selling Competition, DU</div>
        <div class="exp-meta"><span>Sales</span><span>2023</span></div>
        <div class="exp-body">Applied SPIN Selling and consultative frameworks to a live B2B sales scenario inside DU's Professional Selling program. Placed third. Reinforced the value of great discovery questions and understanding what a buyer actually cares about before pitching anything.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-tag">Sales</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <p class="eyebrow fade-up">Projects</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title fade-up">Work I've done.<br>Updated as I build.</h2>
  <div class="projects-grid fade-up">
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-thumb c1">Pipeline Work</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat">SaaS Sales</div>
        <div class="proj-name">Enterprise Pipeline Development — Beyond Now</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Outbound prospecting, account research, AI-driven pitch decks, and deal support at a real SaaS company. First exposure to what the job actually looks like.</div>
        <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Outbound</span><span class="proj-tag">Pitching</span><span class="proj-tag">AI</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-thumb c2">1st Place</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat">Strategy</div>
        <div class="proj-name">Go-to-Market Strategy — Case Competition</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Full GTM recommendation built and presented under competition pressure. Won first place against a field of business school peers and MBA candidates.</div>
        <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">GTM</span><span class="proj-tag">Presenting</span><span class="proj-tag">Strategy</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-thumb c3">3rd Place</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat">Sales</div>
        <div class="proj-name">B2B Sales Simulation — DU Professional Selling</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Applied SPIN Selling and consultative frameworks in a live B2B scenario. Placed 3rd in DU's Professional Selling program competition.</div>
        <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">SPIN</span><span class="proj-tag">Discovery</span><span class="proj-tag">B2B</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-thumb c4">12 Weeks</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat">AI + Certifications</div>
        <div class="proj-name">Structured Certification Sprint</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">One certification per week for 12 weeks across Salesforce, HubSpot, Google AI, Microsoft Azure, IBM Applied AI, and ISC2 Cybersecurity. Posted publicly on LinkedIn as it's completed.</div>
        <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">Salesforce</span><span class="proj-tag">AI</span><span class="proj-tag">Cybersecurity</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-thumb c5">Weekly</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat">Personal Brand</div>
        <div class="proj-name">LinkedIn Learning Series</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">One post per week — a real takeaway from a cert or book, framed around what it means for tech sales. Building a public, verifiable record of growth.</div>
        <div class="proj-tags"><span class="proj-tag">LinkedIn</span><span class="proj-tag">Content</span><span class="proj-tag">Learning</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card placeholder">
      <div class="proj-thumb c6">+ Coming Soon</div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-cat" style="color:var(--mid);">Next project</div>
        <div class="proj-name" style="color:var(--mid);">Updated as new work is completed</div>
        <div class="proj-desc" style="color:var(--mid);">This section grows as I take on new projects, competitions, and freelance work.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LEARNING -->
<section id="learning">
  <p class="eyebrow fade-up">What I'm reading</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title fade-up">The reading list.<br>What's sticking.</h2>
  <div class="books-grid fade-up">
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">Sales</div><div class="book-title">Psychology of Selling</div><div class="book-author">Brian Tracy</div><div class="book-insight">The prospect's self-image determines what they'll buy. Selling to identity — not just pain — is what separates average from good.</div></div>
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">Sales</div><div class="book-title">SPIN Selling</div><div class="book-author">Neil Rackham</div><div class="book-insight">Implication questions are what most reps skip. "What happens if this doesn't get fixed?" is worth more than any feature demo.</div></div>
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">AI</div><div class="book-title">Co-Intelligence</div><div class="book-author">Ethan Mollick</div><div class="book-insight">AI amplifies whatever skills you already have. Reps who learn to use it well get a structural advantage that compounds.</div></div>
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">AI</div><div class="book-title">Life 3.0</div><div class="book-author">Max Tegmark</div><div class="book-insight">The economic shift from AI is real and faster than most expect. Being in AI sales is positioning on the right side of that curve.</div></div>
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">Sales + Psychology</div><div class="book-title">How to Win Friends and Influence People</div><div class="book-author">Dale Carnegie</div><div class="book-insight">Every objection is someone protecting something they value. Ask what they actually care about — then work from there.</div></div>
    <div class="book-card"><div class="book-cat">Cybersecurity</div><div class="book-title">This Is How They Tell Me the World Ends</div><div class="book-author">Nicole Perlroth</div><div class="book-insight">The best way to sell into cybersecurity is to understand why it matters at a real level. This makes the stakes concrete.</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CERTIFICATIONS -->
<section id="certifications">
  <div class="cert-top fade-up">
    <div>
      <p class="eyebrow">Certifications</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:0;">One per week.<br>Twelve weeks.</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="cert-note">A structured plan across sales, AI, and cybersecurity. Updated as each one is earned.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="certs-grid fade-up">
    <div class="cert-card earned"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 01 — Earned</div><div class="cert-nm">AI Essentials</div><div class="cert-org">Google</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 02 — In progress</div><div class="cert-nm">Sales Representative Certification</div><div class="cert-org">Salesforce</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 03</div><div class="cert-nm">Introduction to Generative AI</div><div class="cert-org">Google Cloud</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 04</div><div class="cert-nm">Inbound Sales Certification</div><div class="cert-org">HubSpot</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 05</div><div class="cert-nm">AI Professional Certificate</div><div class="cert-org">Google</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 06</div><div class="cert-nm">Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)</div><div class="cert-org">Microsoft</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 07</div><div class="cert-nm">Sales Enablement Certification</div><div class="cert-org">HubSpot</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 08</div><div class="cert-nm">SaaS Sales Certification</div><div class="cert-org">Winning by Design</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 09</div><div class="cert-nm">Applied AI (Coursera)</div><div class="cert-org">IBM</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Week 10</div><div class="cert-nm">Certified in Cybersecurity (CC)</div><div class="cert-org">ISC2</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Upcoming</div><div class="cert-nm">Sales Navigator Essentials</div><div class="cert-org">LinkedIn</div></div>
    <div class="cert-card soon"><div class="cert-pip"></div><div class="cert-wk">Upcoming</div><div class="cert-nm">CRM Certification</div><div class="cert-org">HubSpot</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COURSEWORK -->
<section id="coursework">
  <p class="eyebrow fade-up">Coursework</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title fade-up">What I studied.<br>Why it connects.</h2>
  <div class="course-intro fade-up">
    <p>Not a transcript — a way to show how four years at DU connects to what I'm building toward. The through line is how people make decisions and how organizations create and communicate value.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="course-grid fade-up">
    <div class="course-block">
      <div class="course-block-label">Sales & Revenue</div>
      <div class="course-list">
        <div><div class="course-nm">Professional Selling</div><div class="course-note-text">Live simulations, discovery frameworks, SPIN methodology</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Negotiation & Persuasion</div><div class="course-note-text">Principled negotiation, BATNA, influence under pressure</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Business Communication</div><div class="course-note-text">Clarity, structure, and brevity across written and verbal formats</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="course-block">
      <div class="course-block-label">Marketing & Strategy</div>
      <div class="course-list">
        <div><div class="course-nm">Digital Marketing</div><div class="course-note-text">Demand creation, SEO, paid media, analytics</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Integrative Marketing Strategy</div><div class="course-note-text">Full-funnel campaign planning and go-to-market thinking</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Consumer Behavior</div><div class="course-note-text">How buying decisions are actually made — beyond rational models</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Brand Management</div><div class="course-note-text">Positioning, differentiation, long-term value building</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="course-block">
      <div class="course-block-label">Psychology & Behavior</div>
      <div class="course-list">
        <div><div class="course-nm">Organizational Psychology</div><div class="course-note-text">How teams, motivation, and culture actually function</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Social Psychology</div><div class="course-note-text">Conformity, influence, group dynamics — foundational for sales</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Cognitive Psychology</div><div class="course-note-text">Attention, memory, decision-making at the brain level</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Research Methods</div><div class="course-note-text">How to design a test, read data, and know what it means</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="course-block">
      <div class="course-block-label">Business & Finance</div>
      <div class="course-list">
        <div><div class="course-nm">Financial Accounting</div><div class="course-note-text">Reading a P&L — foundational for enterprise sales conversations</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Business Statistics</div><div class="course-note-text">Interpreting data, not just presenting it</div></div>
        <div><div class="course-nm">Organizational Behavior</div><div class="course-note-text">How decisions get made inside companies — who really owns the outcome</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" style="border-bottom:none;">
  <p class="eyebrow fade-up">Contact</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title fade-up">Let's talk.</h2>
  <div class="contact-grid fade-up">
    <a href="mailto:alexanderkeberl28@gmail.com" class="contact-tile"><div class="contact-label">Email</div><div class="contact-val">alexanderkeberl28@gmail.com</div></a>
    <a href="tel:7813926577" class="contact-tile"><div class="contact-label">Phone</div><div class="contact-val">781-392-6577</div></a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-eberl-002115275" target="_blank" class="contact-tile"><div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div><div class="contact-val">alexander-eberl-002115275</div></a>
    <div class="contact-tile"><div class="contact-label">Location</div><div class="contact-val">Denver, CO — open to relocation</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>Alexander Kainoa Eberl — Denver, CO</p>
  <p>alexander-eberl.com · Updated March 2026</p>
</footer>

<script>
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach((e,i)=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('visible'),i*70);
      obs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
},{threshold:.07});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
